name: 3 Days Delhi, Agra
description: Explore the capital city Delhi and visit the iconic Taj Mahal in Agra with a short yet enriching itinerary.

name: 3 Days Delhi
description: A quick tour covering major attractions of Delhi including historical monuments, markets, and cultural spots.

name: 4 Days Delhi
description: A relaxed exploration of Delhi with additional time to experience local culture, shopping, and cuisine.

name: 7 Nights Delhi Agra Jaipur
description: A complete Golden Triangle tour covering Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur with heritage sites, forts, and palaces.

name: 6 Days Delhi Agra Jaipur
description: A compact Golden Triangle journey exploring the best of Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur in six days.

name: 7 Days Delhi Shimla Kulu Manali
description: A scenic hill station tour from Delhi covering Shimla, Kullu, and Manali with mountains and adventure activities.

name: 6 Days Leh Ladakh
description: An adventurous trip to Leh Ladakh exploring high-altitude landscapes, monasteries, and scenic valleys.

name: 6 Days Kashmir
description: Discover the beauty of Kashmir with visits to Srinagar, Gulmarg, and Pahalgam, known for lakes and valleys.

name: 5 Days Kashmir
description: A short getaway to Kashmir covering the must-visit destinations with serene landscapes and houseboat stays.
